definitions.usage_example: [TRADUCIR AL FR: He bought the book and the pen as well.]
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [PRONUNCIACIÓN EN FR PARA HABLANTES DE EN]
definitions.usage_example_es: He bought the book and the pen as well.
definitions.usage_context_en: In addition; too. (Used at the end of a clause).
definitions.usage_context_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: In addition; too. (Used at the end of a clause).]

definitions.usage_example: [TRADUCIR AL FR: I don't want to go. Besides, I am tired.]
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [PRONUNCIACIÓN EN FR PARA HABLANTES DE EN]
definitions.usage_example_es: I don't want to go. Besides, I am tired.
definitions.usage_context_en: In addition; moreover (used to add another reason).
definitions.usage_context_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: In addition; moreover (used to add another reason).]

definitions.usage_example: [TRADUCIR AL FR: In addition to his salary, he gets a bonus.]
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [PRONUNCIACIÓN EN FR PARA HABLANTES DE EN]
definitions.usage_example_es: In addition to his salary, he gets a bonus.
definitions.usage_context_en: As an extra person, thing, or circumstance.
definitions.usage_context_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: As an extra person, thing, or circumstance.]

definitions.usage_example: [TRADUCIR AL FR: He is my father's brother. In other words, he is my uncle.]
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [PRONUNCIACIÓN EN FR PARA HABLANTES DE EN]
definitions.usage_example_es: He is my father's brother. In other words, he is my uncle.
definitions.usage_context_en: Used to explain something in a simpler or different way.
definitions.usage_context_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Used to explain something in a simpler or different way.]
